# HIVE OS Pull Request Template\n\n## Description\nProvide a detailed description of your changes. What does this PR do?\n\n## Type of Change\n- [ ] Bug fix\n- [ ] New feature\n- [ ] Enhancement\n- [ ] Documentation\n- [ ] Security improvement\n- [ ] Performance optimization\n\n## Related Issues\nCloses #(issue number)\n\n## Testing\n- [ ] Ran `make test` successfully\n- [ ] All HIVE OS tests pass\n- [ ] Verified on Gentoo system\n- [ ] Verified on Termux (if applicable)\n- [ ] No security regressions\n\n## Changes Checklist\n- [ ] Code follows HIVE OS standards\n- [ ] Updated relevant documentation\n- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md\n- [ ] No hardcoded credentials\n- [ ] Prime Directive compliance verified\n- [ ] Personality-aware behavior verified\n\n## Security Considerations\nDescribe any security implications of this change:\n- [ ] Does this affect authentication?\n- [ ] Does this affect authorization?\n- [ ] Does this expose new attack surface?\n- [ ] Has threat model been updated?\n\n## Architect Review\n- [ ] Approved by Architect (KRACKERJACK1134) if governance policy applies\n- [ ] Zero-trust principles followed\n- [ ] Audit logging implemented\n\n## Additional Context\nAdd any other context about the PR here (screenshots, benchmarks, etc.)\n
